flags.label: 3-year cohort default rate
flags.summary: 3-year cohort default rate at University of Illinois Urbana-Champaign fell 100% between 2021 and 2024 (0.6% → 0.0%).

flags.label: Public bachelor's-predominant peer
flags.summary: 10-year earnings at University of Illinois Urbana-Champaign are 44% above the public bachelor's-predominant peer median ($81.1k vs $56.3k).
